settings_item_wopi_access_token_ttl_secs: How long a newly issued WOPI access token stays valid. Shorter values reduce replay exposure, but tokens that are too short can break long editor sessions.
settings_item_wopi_lock_ttl_secs_desc: How long an active WOPI lock remains valid before it expires automatically unless the client refreshes it.
settings_item_wopi_discovery_cache_ttl_s: How long fetched WOPI discovery metadata is reused before the server refreshes it from the configured discovery endpoint.
settings_item_frontend_preview_apps_json: Admin-managed JSON registry for the public file preview apps exposed to the frontend. Use it to enable, disable, reorder, or add preview viewers and WOPI open/edit apps.
preview_apps_editor_hint: This editor still writes back to the same JSON config, but it lets you edit apps, extension bindings, and provider settings directly instead of hand-writing JSON.
preview_apps_validation_error: Fix the preview app registry errors before saving.
preview_apps_apps_section_desc: Each app is a file open method. Configure its extension bindings and launch settings directly on the app itself.
preview_apps_add_dialog_desc: Choose how to add the app. Embed creates a manually configurable external preview app, while WOPI Discovery asks the server to fetch discovery metadata and generate WOPI open/edit apps for you.
preview_apps_add_dialog_embed_desc: Create an external preview app that you configure manually with a URL template, extension bindings, and allowed origins.
preview_apps_add_dialog_wopi_desc: Provide a discovery URL and let the server parse the supported apps, icons, actions, and extensions into multiple WOPI open/edit app entries.
preview_apps_rules_section_desc: Rules decide which apps appear for matching files, and which one becomes the default open mode.
preview_apps_builtin_key_locked: This built-in app key is fixed and cannot be changed.
preview_apps_builtin_delete_disabled: This built-in app cannot be deleted
preview_apps_icon_hint: Leave this empty to use the default icon. To override it, provide a public image URL.
preview_apps_url_template_variables_hint: URL template values are URL-encoded automatically before insertion.
preview_apps_dialog_desc: Edit the app itself here, including extension bindings, icon overrides, localized names, and provider-specific settings.
preview_apps_url_template_variables_dial: These variables can be used in the URL template. The system URL-encodes values automatically, and {{file_preview_url}} requests a dedicated preview link only when needed.
preview_apps_url_template_variable_file_: The numeric ID of the current file.
The original name of the current file.
preview_apps_url_template_variable_mime_: The MIME type detected for the current file.
preview_apps_url_template_variable_size_: The current file size in bytes.
preview_apps_url_template_variable_downl: The same-origin relative download path for the current file.
The absolute download URL for the current file.
preview_apps_url_template_variable_file_: An absolute preview link suitable for external embeds such as Office or Google viewers. It is created only when this variable is used.
preview_apps_rule_matches_help: Leave a field empty to skip that dimension. Use commas to enter multiple values.
preview_apps_rule_apps_help: Choose which open methods should be shown when this rule matches.
preview_apps_matches_categories_desc: This uses the preview system's detected file categories, such as image, video, audio, pdf, document, and spreadsheet.
preview_apps_list_input_hint: Use commas to enter multiple values.
preview_apps_error_parse: The current draft could not be parsed as preview app config JSON.
preview_apps_error_version_mismatch: The preview app config version must stay at {{version}}.
preview_apps_error_no_apps: At least one preview app is required.
preview_apps_error_app_key_required: App {{index}} must define a non-empty key.
preview_apps_error_builtin_required: Built-in preview app "{{key}}" cannot be removed.
preview_apps_error_url_template_mode_req: URL template app {{index}} must define a mode.
preview_apps_error_url_template_required: URL template app {{index}} must define a URL template.
preview_apps_error_wopi_mode_required: WOPI app {{index}} must define an open mode.
preview_apps_error_wopi_target_required: WOPI app {{index}} must define an action URL or a discovery URL.
preview_apps_error_rule_apps_required: Rule {{index}} must reference at least one app.
preview_apps_error_rule_default_missing: Rule {{index}} default app "{{appKey}}" must also be selected in that rule.
preview_apps_wopi_mode_desc: Controls whether the WOPI host page stays embedded in the dialog or opens in a new tab.
preview_apps_wopi_discovery_dialog_desc: Send the discovery URL to the server so it can fetch the XML, parse the supported apps and extensions, and return updated WOPI open/edit entries into the current draft.
preview_apps_wopi_discovery_success: WOPI apps generated from WOPI Discovery
preview_apps_wopi_action_url_desc: Optional fixed host page URL. If left empty, the backend falls back to discovery.
preview_apps_wopi_discovery_url_desc: Optional discovery endpoint used to resolve the host page dynamically.
preview_apps_wopi_hint_desc: This config only declares how the WOPI host should be resolved. The backend still creates the launch session, signs the access token, and controls lock behavior when the file is opened or edited.
preview_apps_wopi_hint_body: Use either a fixed action URL or a discovery URL here. Clients such as OnlyOffice still depend on the backend for the final launch URL, token lifetime, and WOPI lock/editing semantics.
